privacy.shareCheckInsDesc: Your assigned coach can see your daily check-ins and tracker entries. You can turn this off at any time.

notifications.dailyNudgeBody: How are you doing today? Take a moment to check in.
dailyNudgeBodies: How are you doing today? Take a moment to check in.
A quick check-in keeps your streak — and your clarity — going.
90 seconds for yourself. How's your heart today?
You showed up yesterday. Show up for you again today.
Notice how you're feeling before the day takes over.
One small moment of honesty with yourself. Ready?
Your check-in is waiting whenever you are.
notifications.reminderDesc: When should we nudge you to check in? We'll skip days you've already checked in.
notifications.weekReviewBody: You showed up this week. Open the app to see your check-ins, mood arc, and boundaries held.

membership.premiumFeatures: Phone & video calls with a coach, business hours
membership.restoreNoneBody: We couldn't find any previous purchases for this Apple ID.
membership.restoreErrorBody: Something went wrong restoring your purchases. Please try again.

deleteAccount.confirmMessage: Your data will be permanently deleted within 30 days. This cannot be undone.
